threads.title: Build in Public — myAI Architecture
tweets:
🧵 I built an AI that runs an entire business autonomously.

Website. Blog. Social media. Email. Video scripts. Analytics.

All on autopilot. Here's how:

1/ The Architecture:

A central agent loop runs every cycle:
→ Load 5 pending tasks
→ Execute each one
→ Generate 5 new tasks
→ Log everything
→ Repeat

It's a self-perpetuating business engine.

2/ Website Generation:

The agent builds full HTML/CSS pages:
• Landing page with animations & particles
• About, Services, Pricing, Blog
• Responsive design, dark theme
• Lead capture forms

All generated from code. Zero manual design.

3/ Content Engine:

Every run produces:
• SEO blog posts
• Email campaigns
• Social media posts (4 platforms)
• Video scripts (YouTube + Reels)
• Thumbnails

Content is the fuel. AI is the engine.

4/ Video Marketing:

The agent writes:
• Full YouTube scripts with timestamps
• TikTok/Instagram Reels scripts
• Content calendars
• Hashtag strategies

Video is king. AI makes it scalable.

5/ The Business Model:

Starter: $399/mo — 1 agent, basic site
Pro: $999/mo — 3 agents, full suite
Enterprise: $2,499/mo — unlimited everything

14-day free trial. No credit card.

The math works at scale. 1,000 Pro users = $1M/month.

6/ What's next:

→ Real hosting & deployment (Vercel/Netlify)
→ Stripe payment integration
→ Live AI chatbot
→ API access for enterprise
→ More platforms & integrations

This is just the beginning. Follow for updates.

Link to try it: myai.com
